Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I passed some time reading with Mitsuru...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 13 4 1 5}"A wise man harmonizes, but does not conform"... This story resonates no matter how many times I read it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}By learning about the exploits[n]of renowned individuals, my[n]{f 4 30 0 1 1 0} have improved...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Whew, I think we've hit a good stopping place. Let's retire for the night.[n]{f 1 1}
